# Documentation Playbook

## Document Types

- Quick start.
- How-to guide.
- Reference.
- Architecture or decision record.
- Runbook.

## Placement Rules

- Keep code-coupled docs close to the code.
- Keep cross-cutting guidance in a shared docs surface.
- Avoid duplicated sources of truth.

## Maintenance Rules

- Update docs with code or workflow changes.
- Assign ownership for risky operational docs.
- Archive or remove stale docs clearly.

## Navigation Rules

- Use predictable titles.
- Link related docs explicitly.
- Make the starting path clear for common contributor goals.
